title: Squirrel Removal in Hudson Heights, Manhattan | $900-$2,500 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal services in Hudson Heights, Manhattan. Licensed experts serving Fort Tryon area. Free inspection. Call now: $900-$2,500.
intro: Hudson Heights residents know that squirrels are a common sight in this leafy northern Manhattan neighborhood, but when they invade your home, they become a serious problem. Best Pest Control NYC provides expert squirrel removal services throughout Hudson Heights, from the pre-war buildings along Fort Washington Avenue to the co-ops near Fort Tryon Park. Our humane removal methods protect your property while safely relocating these persistent pests.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has been serving Hudson Heights homeowners for years with specialized knowledge of the neighborhood's unique housing stock and wildlife challenges. Our licensed technicians understand how squirrels exploit entry points in both historic buildings and modern apartments, providing lasting solutions tailored to your specific property.
localContext: Hudson Heights' proximity to Fort Tryon Park and the abundance of mature trees throughout the neighborhood make it particularly attractive to squirrels seeking nesting sites. The area's mix of pre-war apartment buildings, Art Deco co-ops, and townhouses along streets like Cabrini Boulevard provide numerous opportunities for squirrels to access attics, roof spaces, and wall cavities.

faqs.question: Why are squirrels so common in Hudson Heights?
faqs.answer: Hudson Heights' tree-lined streets, proximity to Fort Tryon Park and Inwood Hill Park, and abundance of older buildings with accessible entry points make it an ideal habitat for squirrels. The neighborhood's elevation and greenery provide excellent foraging and nesting opportunities for these adaptable rodents.

faqs.question: What does the $900-$2,500 squirrel removal cost include?
faqs.answer: Our pricing covers a thorough inspection, humane squirrel trapping and removal, identification and sealing of all entry points, attic cleaning and sanitization if needed, and damage repair. The final cost depends on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and extent of any damage to your Hudson Heights property.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to a squirrel problem in Hudson Heights?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service to Hudson Heights residents. Squirrel problems require prompt attention to prevent damage to insulation, wiring, and structural elements, so we prioritize emergency calls and can typically arrive within 24 hours of your initial contact.

faqs.question: Will squirrels return after removal?
faqs.answer: Our comprehensive exclusion methods prevent re-entry by identifying and sealing all potential access points around your property. We provide a warranty on our exclusion work, and our technicians use durable materials designed to withstand the persistent gnawing and climbing abilities of squirrels common to the Hudson Heights area.
